title: Cornercase. Verilog frontend exits with assert instead of an error message

features.name: assign output using module instance identifier as rhs
features.description: Code should include an assign statement where the RHS expression is a module instance name rather than a valid signal or expression, making width detection impossible and triggering an internal error

features.name: generate if-else conditioned on parameter
features.description: Code should include a generate if-else block that branches based on a module parameter value, with different logic instantiated in each branch

features.name: cell attribute annotation on module instantiation
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation preceded by a cell attribute annotation using the (* key="value" *) syntax to set placement or other tool-specific properties

features.name: combinational wire with ternary feedback from output port
features.description: Code should include a wire declaration that is continuously assigned a ternary expression where one branch inverts an output port, creating a combinational feedback path from the output
